completed_tasks.name: Node.js runtime + 3 .deb packages + local apt repo + Chrome install scripts
Wire agent tools install, renumber cleanup, update Packer template

remaining_tasks.name: Run live `packer build` and execute 5 human verification tests from 04-VERIFICATION.md
Plan Phase 5: E2E Validation script (upload QCOW2 → deploy VM → verify tools → tear down)
Clean up untracked stray files and decide on pending untracked artifacts

blockers.description: Phase 4 has 5 human-only verification tests (live Packer build, image boot, postinst runtime behavior, new-user /etc/skel, Chrome DevTools MCP launch)
blockers.workaround: Document results; treat as gate before claiming v0.2.0 Phase 4 fully shipped

human_actions_pending.action: Run `packer build packer/` and confirm fpm builds 3 .debs, dpkg-scanpackages creates the Packages index, apt-cache shows all three
human_actions_pending.context: 04-VERIFICATION.md human test 1 — build-time npm/fpm/network behavior cannot be verified statically

human_actions_pending.action: Boot the QCOW2 and `apt install agentlinux-claude-code agentlinux-gsd agentlinux-chrome-devtools-mcp`; confirm postinsts succeed and `which claude` / `npm list -g` pass
Inspect /etc/skel/.claude.json after install for `chrome-devtools` under mcpServers (jq merge integrity)
Create a new user in the booted image; confirm ~/.claude/get-shit-done, ~/.claude/commands/gsd, ~/.claude/settings.json exist with /usr/bin/node (not a tmp path)
human_actions_pending.context: 04-VERIFICATION.md human test 4 — validates the USER_PLACEHOLDER two-pass sed strategy

human_actions_pending.action: Launch Claude Code as agent user; verify chrome-devtools MCP server appears and starts headless without error
human_actions_pending.context: 04-VERIFICATION.md human test 5 — only way to confirm MCP-03

decisions.decision: Use fpm from staged dir trees (not manual dpkg-deb) for all 3 packages
Rename cleanup from 03-cleanup.sh to 06-cleanup.sh and move to end of provisioner array
decisions.rationale: Slot 03 needed for 03-nodejs.sh; cleanup must run last

decisions.decision: Two-pass sed with USER_PLACEHOLDER sentinel for per-user /etc/skel path fixup
decisions.rationale: Cannot hardcode /home/<user> at build time; postinst needs portable sentinel

uncommitted_files.note: adds `_auto_chain_active: false` flag — likely GSD internal state; decide whether to commit
project-level MCP config — review before committing
captures known recursive pnpm shim bug (motivation for AgentLinux)
appears to backfill a missing phase-1 plan summary
stray zero/near-zero byte files in repo root; almost certainly accidental (e.g. tool misparsing `--version` flag); safe to delete

next_action: Decide path: (A) run human verification tests for Phase 4 on real infra, or (B) plan Phase 5 (End-to-End Validation). Memory notes VM migration to hostinger-vps-2 may be incomplete — confirm infra readiness before A.
context_notes: v0.2.0 milestone is in progress. Phase 3 (bootable image) and Phase 4 (agent tool packages) are execution-complete; Phase 4 has a block of human verification tests that require a live Packer build. ROADMAP.md still shows Phase 4 unchecked at the top and 04-02 unchecked in plan list despite the completion commit e12f482 — the roadmap may need a pass to mark 04-02 and Phase 4 done. Phase 5 plans are TBD.
